item.title: v0.2
item.description:
Habitat V0.2

Changelog

  • Added: A NEW TOOL! Introducing: Leap! The bouncy frog that lets you set a key bind of your choice to have a better looking and more useful Cmd+Tab interface.
  • Improved: Squeak dock gestures on running apps that don’t have an active window.
  • Improved: Burrow layout and file hierarchy structure. Now has a file preview option.
  • Improved: Spark power telemetry report timing and stopped re-sorting the full sample array on every append/read. Stats now update more frequently and accurately.
  • Improved: Spark energy scores are now capped at 80 apps so the JSON can’t grow forever on long-running sessions.
  • Improved: Hoo geo cache is now capped at 256 IPs so long monitor sessions don’t retain unbounded RAM.
  • Improved: Shadow Nook now shows cover art for music like Spotify & Apple music, has an audio visualizer toggle, and now has a camera preview within the settings.
  • Improved: Shadow Nook layout when certain modules are enabled or not.
  • Improved: Shadow Beans dimmer is now 15 Hz and skips redraws when the focused window cutout, opacity, and screen frame are unchanged. Same look, less GPU/CPU when Beans is on.
  • Improved: Button hover effects throughout all tools.
  • Improved: AccessibilityHelper idle CPU usage decreased significantly. Before it ran on every AX poll, now only runs on trust changes or pro status lapses.
  • Improved: Echo Storage cleanup now prunes orphaned PNGs in EchoMedia/ that no longer match history. Prunes copy-event fingerprints when items are removed/cleared. And clears copy-events on “clear all”
  • Improved: Translation localization (still. A work in progress)
  • Fixed: Notch Nook showing extra notches on built in MacBook display when disconnecting from external monitors.
  • Fixed: Transition between Video carousel flashing on cycle loop reset.


    • More to come.

    — Thank you for all the support & feedback!
